THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUNSON, RICHARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 917 FOLSOM STREET #401, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $599.00 RENT, $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,099.00, LEASE FORFEITED, $500 ATNYS FEES INCLUDES COSTS. STAY OF EVICTION ON COND DFT PAY BI-MNTHLY RENT WHEN DUE & TO PAY BACK RENT IN THE AMT OF $50 ON 1ST & 15TH/MO START 6/15/96 UNTIL PAID. IF $599 PAID & RENT CURRENT,PLTF WILL PROVIDE DFT W/STIP TO SET ASIDE JMT & WVE COSTS/FEES. IF NOT, PLTF MAY LIFT STAY W/EX-PARTE APPL
